posts.author: keshav_02
posts.text: IBM fell 25% after result — Yesterday IBM stock plummeted around 25% in a single trading session, wiping out roughly $65 billion in market value . To put that into perspective, it marks IBM’s steepest single-day plunge since at least 1972, even outpacing its decline during the infamous 1987 Black Monday crash. Why it happened: Companies are spending all their money on buying AI hardware (like chips) from other places instead of buying IBM’s regular software. Several massive business deals that IBM expected to finish last month got delayed or canceled at the last minute. This makes me think: Is…
